caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a striped button-down shirt and a black headset with a microphone, is positioned in front of a light-colored wall and pale yellow curtains. The text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the bottom left corner of the view. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking and intermittently touches the area near her right eye with her fingers. Initially, her eyes are closed as she rubs them, and her mouth is slightly open as she speaks. As the sequence progresses, she opens her eyes, looking forward with a focused expression while continuing to speak and maintain contact with her face. The background and her clothing remain constant, while the primary movement is the subtle shift in her facial expressions and the motion of her hand near her eye.
